Who I am

Not just a graduate in progress

Born on 17 March 2002 in Mumbai, I am a young professional building a career at the intersection of communication, sales thinking, and continuous growth. My journey moves through science, engineering, computer science, and real customer-facing work in the real estate space.

I consider myself resilient and adaptable — with a natural inclination toward communication, presentation, and building rapport. The role of an IT Sales Executive feels right because it combines human connection, business understanding, and persuasion — all areas I am serious about mastering.
